title: invisible smp modpack
body:
Requirements: Android 12 or higher, Vulkan 1.1 or higher

Introducing the lightweight version of our Minecraft modpack for the Pojav Launcher, streamlined for peak performance. Centered around VulkanMod, this edition focuses purely on harnessing the power of the Vulkan API, replacing OpenGL for unmatched graphic efficiency and speed. Stripped of additional mods, it's tailored for players who prioritize performance above all, ensuring a smooth, high-speed Minecraft experience even on less powerful systems. Ideal for those seeking a no-frills, performance-centric Minecraft adventure, this lightweight version delivers pure, unadulterated gaming speed and reliability.
